useful_deltas.summary: Added a structure-pure same/inward four-leg double-diagonal Black-Scholes simulator with catalog/evolve dispatch, exact adverse percentage and fixed-dollar leg costs, one-position cadence, capital fields, and behavioral tests.

Falsified the exact predeclared neutral/high-IV 14/60-DTE seed across BAC/F/SOFI/PLTR/TSLL/SMCI/AMD/AAPL: 8/8 completed and 0/8 passed both chronological train/holdout cost axes plus absolute gates, so no hypothesis or capital seat was created.

Repaired debit-spread capital honesty by intrinsic-flooring American protective legs, preserving signed adverse liquidation, sizing reported loss to the larger of structural debit and observed stressed path loss, and separating the enforced one-lot operating cap from generic theoretical capacity.
Promoted the chronological experiment into a checked-in runner with a conjunctive train AND untouched-holdout AND window-integrity gate and an explicit passing-holdout/failing-train negative control.

Made the existing deterministic integration recovery path explicitly parseable as --integrate-only with an explicit stamp, and added a context-only behavioral regression that proves mode/stamp parsing without invoking finalization or integration.

critic_findings.finding: F1: the chronological reject experiment lacked a durable checked-in runner.
critic_findings.rationale: The finalizer added a thin reproducible runner for the exact eight-symbol 60/40 dual-cost design without reopening or retuning the rejected family.

critic_findings.finding: F2: the lab lacked an explicit passing-holdout/failing-train fail-open negative control.
critic_findings.rationale: The complete evidence predicate now requires train, untouched holdout, and window/integrity gates conjunctively; the new negative control proves a failed train cannot be rescued by a passing holdout.

critic_findings.finding: F3: same-close daily-bar entry remains promotion-blocking.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as an outstanding repair for this run because every project and readiness surface explicitly limits the result to L0 proxy discovery; no candidate, L1, paper, or universal-family claim depends on same-close semantics. A future prior-completed intraday route is the sole NEXT rather than an unstated current TODO.

critic_findings.finding: F4: the symmetric zero-offset structure is economically a double calendar and must not be labeled as universal diagonal-family death.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a current defect because catalog text says double-calendar/inside-wing diagonal and all final surfaces scope the outcome to the exact 14/60 seed/configuration/cycle. No universal calendar, diagonal, or time-spread closure is claimed.

critic_findings.finding: Finalizer review found that European BS protective marks below intrinsic plus a zero-clipped liquidation could hide closing friction and overstate paid debit as a hard loss bound; generic capital capacity could also report 2–3 lots despite the stated one-lot operating posture.
critic_findings.rationale: American protective legs now retain intrinsic value, adverse package liquidation remains signed, structural debit is labeled before closing friction, and capital uses max(structural debit, observed stressed path loss). Operating max_lots is capped at one while theoretical_max_lots retains generic capacity math. Boundary tests prove deep-ITM front-expiry behavior, a realized path loss greater than structural debit, and the one-lot/theoretical-capacity separation without weakening the $300 gate.

data_dependencies: Observed historical option surfaces with complete entry/exit leg joins are required before any double-diagonal evidence can exceed L0.
Listed expirations/strikes, assignment/exercise/dividend behavior, commissions, and quote-fill calibration remain unmodeled.
Same-close daily-bar proxy entry cannot support promotion; future session-time evidence must use prior-completed bars.
The forward TSLL option archive remains one of three required distinct New York market dates for replay plumbing; three dates still do not establish historical edge.
next: Build one no-lookahead completed-30-minute-bar session-time evidence route for defined-risk PCS/CCS/IC across BAC/F/SOFI/PLTR/TSLL/SMCI/AMD/AAPL using prior-completed features, open/midday/late buckets, chronological train selection then untouched holdout, both 5% and $0.01-per-leg cost axes, exact ledger, and no same-bar/same-bucket reentry; reject unless positive non-vacuous holdouts meet max_loss_usd <= $300, window max DD <= $75, and dense-negative windows <= 5. Keep L0, register nothing first pass, and do not reopen the rejected double-diagonal seed or closed daily-bar families.
